ideation: This animation sequence depicts a robot interacting with a couch and lamp emoji.  The robot will start with arms at its sides, then reach out to the couch as if settling in, and finally rest its arms on the imaginary couch. This conveys comfort and relaxation. Frame 1 will have the robot in a neutral stance. Frame 2 will show the robot extending its arms, slightly bending them as if to settle onto the couch. Frame 3 will show the robot with arms resting comfortably on the imaginary couch. Frame 4 will show the robot gently adjusting its position, possibly shifting its weight. Frame 5 will show the robot relaxing completely, arms at rest on the couch.

frames.beat: arms hang at the sides, ready to relax
arms lift slightly, preparing to settle
arms extend forward, reaching for the couch
arms rest gently on the imaginary couch
settling in, fully relaxed on the couch
